en: Like, I got a text about a month or so ago from my mother.
ko: 한 달쯤 전에 엄마한테 문자 받았어.

en: In the middle of a nice day, all caps,
I wish we could do your childhood over.
ko: 너의 어린 시절을 다시 할 수 있으면 좋겠어.

en: With a little baby bottle emoji.
What does that, like, I didn't even know what that,.
ko: 그게 뭐지, 나는 그게 뭔지조차 몰랐어,

en: Like, what was the tone of that?
Was it, I didn't know if she was being contrite,.

ko: 아니면 향수에 젖어 있는 건지 모르겠어.
그녀가 내가 이 일을 하게 된 이유에 대해 책임을 지고 있는 건지,

en: For whatever caused me to do this for a fucking living?
Or was she just sort of reflecting,.
ko: 우리가 네가 네 살 때 친구였던 거 기억나?

en: And like, we were friends when you were four,
I don't know if you remember that.
I don't think I can handle it!
ko: 나는 감당할 수 없을 것 같아!
